rationale: The citing paper references Swaminathan, Murshed, and Hulland (2008) mainly as a prior example of overlap/relatedness work in acquisitions (strategic emphasis) and again in a grouped list of marketing-acquisition studies. The citation helps provide broad background and position the literature stream, but the paper does not build its hypotheses, measures, or empirical design directly on that study. The core theorizing and tests center on innovation overlap and relational overlap with different moderators, so this specific cited work does not appear to play a distinct substantive role.
